name: Zane and Brey (Lucario and Cinderace)
description:
Going out with ur roommates!

Can you make it through a cafe with the dynamic duo of Pokemon?

I love Pokemon, and Lucario and Cinderace are two of my favorite of all time!!!

Sorry for the long ass break! I got temp banned for reuploading my old bots so I'm giving up on that, they'll all remain on my old account but I won't reupload them to here. Anyway! Currently listening to YonKaGor!! Love their music, anyway love you all!!! Have a great day!!
creator: DingusMcBingus
